title: senna corifolia
intro: Senna corifolia, also known as country madder or prickly senna, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its laxative and diuretic effects due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna corifolia include relieving constipation, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Senna corifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves and roots are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to create various remedies.
